platforms-shopify.question: Can Haitu support Shopify multi-market content?

tools-product-video-script-generator.question: Can the script be used directly for product video generation?
tools-product-video-script-generator.answer: Yes. Use the script with product photos, references, target ratios, and selling point order as inputs for product video generation, then review the generated shots and copy.

tools-product-video-script-generator.answer: The script generator structures the opening, pain point, benefits, shots, and CTA first. The video generator then uses scripts, product images, and references to create video assets.

compare-haitu-vs-canva-for-product-video.question: When is Haitu a better fit for product videos?

terms.description: Read the basic terms for using Haitu product image optimization, product video generation, hosted models, and bring-your-own-model workflows.

sections.heading: Accounts, balance, and AI generation services
sections.body: Users can upload and manage product data in the console, then use wallet balance for product image optimization, video generation, marketing script organization, and later AI image creative services. Balance is only used for digital SaaS services inside Haitu.

sections.heading: Prohibited use

sections.heading: AI output requires human review

faqs.question: What type of service is Haitu?
faqs.answer: Haitu is an AI product image and video creation SaaS tool for cross-border ecommerce. It provides digital content generation and asset management, not physical goods.

faqs.question: Can AI-generated assets be published directly?
faqs.answer: Publishing without review is not recommended. Users should check product accuracy, marketplace rules, advertising compliance, and intellectual property risks.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Haitu
privacy.description: Learn how Haitu handles account information, product facts, reference images, generation tasks, model configuration, and payment-related data.
privacy.lead: Haitu processes account data, login information, product data, reference images, generation records, model configuration, and payment status to provide product creative workflows, account management, billing, and security. Haitu does not store full card numbers, WeChat Pay accounts, or Alipay accounts.

sections.heading: Data we may process
sections.body: This may include account email, login and session information, workspace information, product titles, materials, dimensions, selling points, reference images, generation records, model settings, wallet ledger records, payment status, and technical logs.

sections.heading: Payment details are handled by payment providers
sections.body: Users complete WeChat Pay, Alipay, or card payments through Stripe Checkout and other payment pages. Haitu receives order ID, payment status, amount, currency, and settlement result, but does not store full card numbers, WeChat Pay accounts, or Alipay accounts.

sections.heading: User content and third-party models
sections.body: When users choose hosted or own models, product facts, reference images, and prompts may be sent to the relevant model provider to complete generation tasks. Avoid uploading sensitive or unauthorized content.

faqs.question: Will product content be translated automatically?
faqs.answer: Site localization does not automatically change user-uploaded product content. Product facts stay in the language provided unless the user requests localized generation or rewriting.

faqs.question: Can users request deletion?
faqs.answer: Users can contact support to request deletion or export. Handling may depend on account status, billing records, legal requirements, and backup cycles.

refund.title: Refund Policy - Haitu
refund.description: Understand the basic rules for Haitu top-ups, wallet balance, model calls, failed generation tasks, and refund handling.
refund.lead: Haitu fees cover product image optimization, video generation, marketing script organization, model calls, and platform services. After users pay through Stripe Checkout with WeChat Pay, Alipay, or cards, wallet balance is credited and used for digital SaaS services.

sections.heading: Unused balance can be reviewed by support
sections.body: If a top-up has not been used, users may contact support for manual refund review. The actual refund path depends on Stripe or other payment channels, fees, account status, and risk-control requirements.

sections.heading: Consumed AI generation services are generally non-refundable
sections.body: Once a task has called third-party models or consumed platform resources, image optimization, video generation, and script organization services generally cannot be refunded as unused balance. System errors or duplicate charges can be reviewed by support.

sections.heading: Contact support with records first
sections.body: For refunds or wallet adjustments, provide account email, payment record, task ID, and issue description so the team can check generation and billing records.

faqs.question: Does unsatisfactory AI output always qualify for a refund?
faqs.answer: Not always. AI generation is probabilistic, and tasks that incurred model costs need to be reviewed based on failure cause, billing record, and platform rules.

faqs.question: What if I was charged twice?
faqs.answer: If duplicate charges or system errors occur, contact support with account, time, payment record, and task ID for review.
